title: Diocesan Code of Business Conduct
summary: This policy establishes standards of ethical and legal conduct for all clergy, employees, and volunteers across the Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee, covering conflicts of interest, use of organizational assets, recordkeeping, confidentiality, and unacceptable behaviors.
notes: 1. The document is labeled 'Appendix 16,' suggesting it is part of a larger policy manual, but the parent manual is not identified — a human reviewer should confirm the correct chapter/section address. 2. The effective date is inferred from 'Rev 8/14' and the 'Summary of Revisions effective August 2014' notation; no explicit calendar date is given. 3. The Chancellor's Office is mentioned as the custodian of the related Code of Pastoral Conduct, but no specific owner role is designated for this Code of Business Conduct itself — the CFO or Vicar General may be equally plausible owners. 4. No review cadence or next review date is stated. 5. No records retention period is specified. 6. The document references a companion policy — 'Code of Pastoral Conduct for Church Personnel and Volunteers' (original 2001, revised 2003) — which should be cross-referenced. 7. The acknowledgement form at the end is incorporated into this document rather than a separate appendix (per the revision note referencing old Appendix 20); HR should confirm signed forms are being collected and retained.
_source_file: Appendix 16  Diocesan Code of Business Conduct Policy.pdf
